OptionDescription.SourceString: The strength of the force that will constantly push the player while skydiving in the volume. A negative value will push the player towards the bottom of the volume, a positive value will push the player towards the top of the volume, and a value of zero will apply no push. The higher the value, the stronger the push will be. The push will be relative to the rotation of the volume.
OptionDescription.LocalizedString: The strength of the force that will constantly push the player while skydiving in the volume. A negative value will push the player towards the bottom of the volume, a positive value will push the player towards the top of the volume, and a value of zero will apply no push. The higher the value, the stronger the push will be. The push will be relative to the rotation of the volume.
